sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 85 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 27. 2. For order on CMA No. 929/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 04.12.2025 Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel states that this matter pertains to tax year 2018, therefore, the department shall take appropriate action under the law. In view of hereof, he states that this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
